name: ham
description: Hierarchical Agent Memory (HAM) — directory-scoped CLAUDE.md files for token reduction in agentic coding. 14+ commands including benchmarking, carbon reporting, HAM Pro compatibility layer, and dashboard. Reduces token usage via scoped context management.
review: One of the strongest community submissions reviewed. HAM is functionally complete with 35KB of thorough SKILL.md documentation, Pro compatibility, benchmarking, carbon tracking, and dashboard. Directory-scoped CLAUDE.md files address a real high-impact problem: token reduction for agentic coding.
